AutoImportContent.Name: Automatically import content
AutoImportContent.Hint: Creates world items, NPCs and journal entries extracted from the manual the first time the system is opened.

CompactSheets.Name: Compact sheets
CompactSheets.Hint: Enables a denser layout to reduce the screen space used by sheets.

CharacterPortraitMode.Name: Character image mode
CharacterPortraitMode.Hint: GM session control: framed portrait or exterior standee with deity background.

CharacterPortraitScale.Name: Exterior figure size
CharacterPortraitScale.Hint: Size percentage for the exterior character figure and deity banner.

VestCalibration.Name: Calibrate vest patch positions
VestCalibration.Hint: GM only. Allows patches to be dragged over the vest to save exact coordinates per slot.

SkillEditUnlocked.Name: Skill dice editing unlocked
SkillEditUnlocked.Hint: Local state for the wrench button on the sheet.

ExtendedMotoRules.Name: Expanded motorcycle rules
ExtendedMotoRules.Hint: Enables automations and options that are not part of the strict manual core: generated tune-ups with custom effects, contextual modifiers for unofficial parts and expanded riding actions such as pushing the engine. Disable it to use only declared effects from the manual and official system items.
